hooks.command: npx prettier --write "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || black "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || rustfmt "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || gofmt -w "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "NOTE: No formatter available for $FILE_PATH"

lines=$(wc -l < "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); code_lines=$(grep -cE '^[[:space:]]*[^#[:space:]]' "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$lines" -le 250 ] || echo "WARNING: $FILE_PATH has $lines lines ($code_lines code lines, limit 250, Working Memory Cliff). Consider splitting."

case "$FILE_PATH" in *.py) python -m py_compile "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; *.json) python -m json.tool "$FILE_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1;; *.sh) bash -n "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; *.yml|*.yaml) python -c "import sys,yaml; yaml.safe_load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; *.toml) python -c "import sys,tomllib; tomllib.load(open(sys.argv[1],'rb'))" "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1;; esac || true
if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE "(\.env$|\.log$|node_modules/)"; then echo "WARNING: Writing to potentially sensitive path: $FILE_PATH"; fi
grep -nE "from [\"'][^\"/]+(/[^\"/]+)+\.(service|data|types|adapter)[\"']" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo "WARNING: Deep import detected in $FILE_PATH - import through index only" || true

if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -q "CLAUDE.md"; then lines=$(wc -l < "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); [ "$lines" -le 200 ] || echo "WARNING: CLAUDE.md has $lines lines (limit 200). Consider trimming."; fi

if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"block":true,"message":"Cannot edit on main/master. Create a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

if [ -f "$FILE_PATH" ] && grep -qE "(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|PRIVATE.KEY|-----BEGIN.*(RSA|EC|DSA|OPENSSH)|AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|xoxb-|sk_live_|rk_live_|whsec_|SG\\.|AIza)" "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then echo '{"block":true,"message":"Potential secret/key detected in file! Remove before writing."}' >&2; exit 2; fi

echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE "(rm -rf /|git reset --hard|git push.*--force|DROP TABLE|TRUNCATE|git clean|git checkout -- \\.|docker system prune|chmod -R 777)" && { echo '{"block":true,"message":"Destructive command blocked. Use with explicit user approval only."}' >&2; exit 2; } || true

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); f="brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || echo "# Session Log: ${d}" > "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; echo "## Session ended: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; commits=$(git log --oneline --since="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 00:00" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); echo "## Session stats: $commits commits today" >> "$f"; fi

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); f="brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; [ -f "$f" ] || echo "# Session Log: ${d}" > "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; echo "## Session started: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "$f"; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$branch" ] && echo "Branch: $branch" >> "$f"; echo "" >> "$f"; fi; if [ -f tasks/lessons.md ]; then echo "REMINDER: Read tasks/lessons.md for past learnings"; fi; if [ -f tasks/current.md ]; then echo "REMINDER: Read tasks/current.md for handoff context"; head -3 tasks/current.md; fi; unstaged=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$unstaged" -gt 0 ] && echo "WARNING: $unstaged uncommitted changes from previous session"; [ -f tasks/current.md ] && cp tasks/current.md tasks/.current.md.bak 2>/dev/null || true; if [ -f .template-manifest.json ] && [ -f scripts/check-drift.sh ]; then proj_ver=$(python3 -c "import json;print(json.load(open('.template-manifest.json'))['template_version'])" 2>/dev/null || true); script_ver=$(grep -oP 'TEMPLATE_VERSION="([^"]+)"' scripts/check-drift.sh 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f2 || true); [ -n "$proj_ver" ] && [ -n "$script_ver" ] && [ "$proj_ver" != "$script_ver" ] && echo "WARNING: Template outdated ($proj_ver vs $script_ver). Run /update-template."; fi; if git remote get-url template &>/dev/null 2>&1; then last_fetch=$(git log -1 --format=%ct refs/remotes/template/main 2>/dev/null || git log -1 --format=%ct refs/remotes/template/master 2>/dev/null || echo 0); now=$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$now" -gt 0 ] && [ "$last_fetch" -gt 0 ]; then days_since=$(( (now - last_fetch) / 86400 )); [ "$days_since" -gt 7 ] && echo "INFO: Template not checked in ${days_since}d. Run 'bash scripts/sync-template.sh --from-git --dry-run' to check."; fi; fi

if [ -d brain/01-daily ]; then d=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); echo "" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; echo "## Pre-compaction save: $(date +%H:%M)" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$changed" ] && echo "Changed files:" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md" && echo "$changed" >> "brain/01-daily/${d}.md"; echo "IMPORTANT: Save current task state to tasks/current.md before compaction"; fi
